participant_id.Description: BIDS participant identifier used in this dataset. sub-aa01 corresponds to original source/code sub-aa06.

paper_case_id.Description: Case-study identifier used in the accompanying participant table.

age_at_first_scan.Description: Age in years at first scan.

disability_duration.Description: Duration or history of pre-amputation limb disability.

phantom_position_and_mobility.Description: Reported position and mobility of the phantom limb.

phantom_sensations_onset.Description: Reported onset of phantom sensations after amputation.

session_pre1_timing.Description: Timing of ses-pre1 relative to amputation.

session_pre2_timing.Description: Timing of ses-pre2 relative to amputation.

session_post1_timing.Description: Timing of ses-post1 relative to amputation.

session_post2_timing.Description: Timing of ses-post2 relative to amputation.

session_post3_timing.Description: Timing of ses-post3 relative to amputation, where available.

phantom_limb_sensation_intensity_3m_6m_p.Description: Phantom limb sensation intensity on a 0-100 scale at post1/post2/post3 equivalent timepoints where available.

phantom_limb_sensation_frequency.Description: Reported phantom limb sensation frequency across post-amputation follow-up timepoints.

chronic_pls_intensity_3m_6m_post3.Description: Chronic phantom limb sensation intensity on a 0-100 scale at post1/post2/post3 equivalent timepoints where available.

limb_pain_intensity_pre_3m_6m_post3.Description: Limb pain intensity on a 0-100 scale at pre/post1/post2/post3 equivalent timepoints where available.

limb_pain_frequency.Description: Reported limb pain frequency across timepoints.

chronic_limb_pain_pre_3m_6m_post3.Description: Chronic limb pain intensity on a 0-100 scale at pre/post1/post2/post3 equivalent timepoints where available.

transient_limb_pain_pre_3m_6m_post3.Description: Transient limb pain intensity on the day on a 0-100 scale at pre/post1/post2/post3 equivalent timepoints where available.

pain_detect_score_pre_3m_6m_post3.Description: Pain Detect score as percent of maximum possible score at pre/post1/post2/post3 equivalent timepoints where available.

pain_detect_pain_course.Description: Pain Detect pain course category/description across timepoints.

upper_extremity_functional_index_pre_3m_.Description: Upper Extremity Functional Index score expressed as percent impairment at pre/post1/post2/post3 equivalent timepoints where available.
